title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Public Debt 1*** Act, 1944. 2* * * * * (3) It shall come into force on such date3 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint in this behalf.
footnote: 1. The brackets and words "(Central Government)" omitted by Act 6 of 1949, s. 3 (w.e.f. 1-4-1949). 2. Sub-section (2) omitted by Act 57 of 1956, s. 3 (w.e.f. 15-10-1956). 3. 1st May, 1946, see Gazette of India, 1946, Pt. I. p. 575.
